message:
chore: fix workflow permissions and improve gitignore

- Add packages:write permission to cleanup-old-images job
- Remove .claude/settings.local.json from tracking (user-specific)
- Ignore .private-journal/ (personal notes)
- Ignore .devcontainer/Dockerfile.generated and oci-cache/ (build artifacts)

Fixes daily Docker build cleanup job failing with "Resource not accessible by integration"
